page_content:
Formerly: COMM498V.

COMM468 Seminar in Mediated Communication (3 Credits)

The examination of special topics related to the study of mediated communication.

Restriction: Junior standing or higher.

Repeatable to: 12 credits if content differs.

COMM469 The Discourse of Social Movements (3 Credits)

Study of key social movements that have influenced American social and political life.
